mapper.sql: id, course_id, title, long_title, category, summary, source, status, content, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_announcement WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_announcement (course_id, title, long_title, category, summary, source, status, content, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{title}, #{longTitle}, #{category}, #{summary}, #{source}, #{status}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_announcement SET course_id = #{courseId}, title = #{title}, long_title = #{longTitle}, category = #{category}, summary = #{summary}, source = #{source}, status = #{status}, content = #{content}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_announcement SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
